title: Greenpill Phangan Environmental Monitoring
dek: Greenpill Phangan's Hub updates connect beach cleanups, Monthly Earth Day, DeCleanup, and decentralized environmental monitoring.
excerpt: A source-backed Phangan story for cleanup coordination, environmental monitoring, and public impact tooling.
body:
Greenpill Phangan now has a stronger chapter-owned initiative than an event-only record.

The public Phangan update thread describes ongoing beach cleanup work, Monthly Earth Day activity, and the origin path for DeCleanup Rewards. A later update adds a decentralized environmental monitoring analysis for Koh Phangan using Altruist Sensors by the Robonomics DePIN Network.

The DeCleanup Network update gives the wider project context: app launch, Celo testing, playbook publication, and public docs. For the Greenpill site, the chapter-owned surface should stay focused on Phangan's cleanup and monitoring work while treating DeCleanup as supporting public tooling context.

## Sources

- S051: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-phangan-updates/95
- S052: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/decleanup-network-base-app-launched-celo-in-testing-playbook-published-docs-live-heres-everything/394
author: Greenpill Network research
